queries.question: How many products are in the Northwind system?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products; - Expected: 77

queries.question: Who are the top 5 customers by total number of orders?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5;

queries.question: What is the average revenue per order?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT AVG(CAST(SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS FLOAT)) FROM order_details GROUP BY order_id; - or compute from orders table if it has total_price

queries.question: List employee names and the number of orders they handled.
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT e.first_name, e.last_name, COUNT(o.order_id) FROM employees e LEFT JOIN orders o ON e.employee_id = o.employee_id GROUP BY e.employee_id;

queries.question: Which product has the highest unit price?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 1;

queries.question: Rank product categories by number of products.
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT c.category_name, COUNT(p.product_id) FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_id ORDER BY COUNT(p.product_id) DESC;

queries.question: How many employees are in the company?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employees; - Expected: 9

queries.question: How many total orders are there?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders; - Expected: ~830

queries.question: What is the average shipping cost?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT AVG(freight) FROM orders;

queries.question: Which supplier provides the most products?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT s.company_name, COUNT(p.product_id) FROM suppliers s LEFT JOIN products p ON s.supplier_id = p.supplier_id GROUP BY s.supplier_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

queries.question: Which order has the highest total value?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT order_id, SUM(quantity * unit_price) as total FROM order_details GROUP BY order_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1;

queries.question: How many customers are in the database?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers; - Expected: 91

queries.question: Filter products with unit price between 20 and 30.
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products WHERE unit_price BETWEEN 20 AND 30;

queries.question: Sort customers by city name.
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT company_name, city FROM customers ORDER BY city, company_name;

queries.question: How many products are out of stock?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE units_in_stock = 0;

queries.question: Compute the total quantity of products in stock.
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT SUM(units_in_stock) FROM products;

queries.question: Which customer spent the most?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT customer_id, SUM(CAST(quantity * unit_price AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as total_spent FROM order_details od JOIN orders o ON od.order_id = o.order_id GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 1;

queries.question: List orders by month.
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date) as year, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date) as month, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY year, month ORDER BY year, month;

queries.question: Rank employees by number of orders handled, highest to lowest.
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT e.employee_id, e.last_name, COUNT(o.order_id) as order_count FROM employees e LEFT JOIN orders o ON e.employee_id = o.employee_id GROUP BY e.employee_id ORDER BY order_count DESC;

queries.question: Which product has the lowest price?
queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM products ORDER BY unit_price ASC LIMIT 1;

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, c.company_name, e.first_name, e.last_name FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN employees e ON o.employee_id = e.employee_id ORDER BY o.order_date DESC LIMIT 5;
queries.question: List the 5 most recent orders with customer name and responsible employee.

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT p.product_name FROM products p WHERE p.product_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM order_details);
queries.question: Which products have never been ordered?

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT c.country, ROUND(SUM(od.quantity * od.unit_price)::numeric, 2) AS total_revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id JOIN order_details od ON o.order_id = od.order_id GROUP BY c.country ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
queries.question: What is the total revenue by customer country?

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT p.product_name, SUM(od.quantity) AS total_qty FROM order_details od JOIN products p ON od.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5;
queries.question: What are the top 5 best-selling products by quantity?

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN employees e ON o.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o.order_date) = 1997 GROUP BY e.employee_id, e.first_name, e.last_name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 1;
queries.question: Which employee handled the most orders in 1997?

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT c.customer_id, c.company_name FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders);
queries.question: List customers who have no orders.

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT s.company_name, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders o JOIN shippers s ON o.ship_via = s.shipper_id GROUP BY s.company_name ORDER BY order_count DESC;
queries.question: What is the number of orders by shipping company?

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT s.company_name, ROUND(AVG(p.unit_price)::numeric, 2) AS avg_price FROM suppliers s JOIN products p ON s.supplier_id = p.supplier_id GROUP BY s.company_name ORDER BY avg_price DESC;
queries.question: What is the average product price by supplier?

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT od.order_id, SUM(od.quantity * od.unit_price) AS total_value FROM order_details od GROUP BY od.order_id HAVING SUM(od.quantity * od.unit_price) > (SELECT AVG(sub.total_value) FROM (SELECT SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS total_value FROM order_details GROUP BY order_id) sub) ORDER BY total_value DESC;
queries.question: Which orders have total value above the average order value?

queries.ground_truth_answer: SELECT o.customer_id, SUM(od.quantity * od.unit_price) AS total_spent FROM orders o JOIN order_details od ON o.order_id = od.order_id GROUP BY o.customer_id ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 5;
queries.question: Who are the top 5 customers by total spending?

queries.ground_truth_answer: RAG: find Vinamilk 2024 strategy; SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders;

queries.question: According to Masan's 2025 report, what is the main strategy and how many orders are currently in the system?
queries.ground_truth_answer: RAG: find Masan 2025 strategy; SQL: SELECT SUM(units_in_stock) FROM products;

queries.question: According to FPT's 2023 report, what is the main strategy and how many orders are currently in the system?
queries.ground_truth_answer: RAG: find FPT 2023 strategy; SQL: SELECT customer_id, SUM(quantity*unit_price) as total FROM order_details GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1;

queries.question: According to Vinamilk's 2024 report, what is the main strategy and how many orders are currently in the system?
queries.ground_truth_answer: RAG: find Vinamilk 2024 strategy; SQL: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date) as year, COUNT(*) FROM orders GROUP BY year;
